title: Stale test fn names after method renames
description: 13 test function names (chat_set_update_muted_*, message_set_update_*, message_set_destroy_*, space_set_*, chat_set_destroy_*, chat_create_direct_*, etc.) still reference the old method names after jqa.4+5 renames. Running cargo test --list shows these names; contributors searching for 'chat_update' tests won't find them.
